description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named iOS that runs on every pull request to the master branch and on push events to the master branch, excluding changes to .github/workflows. Use a macos-12 job that checks out the repository, installs cmake, ninja, and openjdk, sets up the latest stable XCode version, installs Qt 5.15.2 for iOS, and then configures and builds a project using cmake with specific settings for iOS and Qt.
